jd_text: We are partnering with a high-profile, government-affiliated office in the UAE seeking to appoint a Director of Operations to support a senior leadership figure on strategic, high-impact initiatives. This is a unique opportunity to operate at the intersection of government, business, and philanthropy , driving engagement at both regional and global level. This position acts as a strategic right hand , responsible for leading key initiatives across high-level stakeholder engagements. You will play a critical role in: Building and managing relationships with senior stakeholders across government, private sector, and philanthropic organisations Leading strategic initiatives, including research, insights, and thought leadership Overseeing high-level convenings such as roundtables, forums, and international engagements Driving external positioning, communications, and stakeholder messaging Managing a small team and ensuring effective execution of priorities We are looking for a senior, credible professional who can operate confidently in a complex and high-level environment. Key requirements: 10+ years of experience in a leadership role Strong background in stakeholder engagement, or strategic roles Experience within government, international organisations, or highly matrixed environments Excellent communication and relationship-building skills Ability to engage with C-level and government stakeholders Strategic mindset with a hands-on approach DUE TO THE NUMBER OF APPLICATIONS RECEIVED, ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE CONTACTED
